concerns.text: FR-002 requires the system to 'preprocess fMRI data using fMRIPrep Docker container'. Task T012 downloads pre-processed derivatives, and T013 explicitly states 'Do not run fMRIPrep'. There is no task to execute the fMRIPrep container or wrap it, leaving FR-002 unimplemented.

FR-005 mandates 'two-sample t-tests'. The plan and tasks (T047, T048) implement 'Linear Regression (ANCOVA)' with covariates. While scientifically sound, there is no task explicitly implementing the two-sample t-test required by FR-005, creating a coverage gap for the specified requirement.

SC-004 requires sensitivity analysis sweeping thresholds over {10%, 15%, 20%}. Task T025 defines the sweep set as '{%, 15%, [deferred], [deferred]}'. The specific values 10% and 20% are missing from the task definition, failing to cover the success criteria.

SC-001 requires measuring preprocessing success rate against a ≥90% threshold. While T013 logs provenance and T014/T015 log exclusions, there is no specific task to calculate the success rate (valid outputs / total attempts) and explicitly compare it against the 90% threshold as required by SC-001.

SC-002 requires measuring centrality completeness against a ≥95% threshold for all 400 ROIs. Tasks T020-T023 compute centrality, but no task is defined to calculate the percentage of participants with valid values for all ROIs and compare it against the 95% threshold.

SC-005 requires measuring classifier performance against a baseline. Task T034 calculates baseline accuracy but does not explicitly include a task to compare the final results against the baseline defined in SC-005 (computed from null distribution or literature) and report the comparison.

The Plan Phase 1 mandates 'Null Model Generation' to establish a baseline for centrality metrics. While T044-T046 implement this, the Plan also explicitly mentions 'Network-Based Statistic (NBS)' in Phase 2. There is no task implementing NBS or permutation tests to account for graph interdependence as required by the Plan's Phase 2 description.

Task T022 references undefined placeholders '{%, 15%, [deferred], [deferred]}' for threshold values. While [deferred] is sanctioned, the '%' symbol is a typo/formatting error that should be a specific number or a clear [deferred] marker to ensure the task is actionable.
